'''sadofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swallowtail|swallowtail]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swallowtail|swallowtail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sadofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædefeth|sædefeth]] || [[word:sædefej|sædefej]] || [[word:sædefesh|sædefesh]] || [[word:sædefe|sædefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadodofoth|sadodofoth]] || [[word:sadodofoj|sadodofoj]] || [[word:sadodofosh|sadodofosh]] || [[word:sadodofo|sadodofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadofoth|sadofoth]] || [[word:sadofoj|sadofoj]] || [[word:sadofosh|sadofosh]] || [[word:sadofo|sadofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadoffoth|sadoffoth]] || [[word:sadoffoj|sadoffoj]] || [[word:sadoffosh|sadoffosh]] || [[word:sadoffof|sadoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadofotho|sadofotho]] || [[word:sadofojo|sadofojo]] || [[word:sadofosho|sadofosho]] || [[word:sadofoko|sadofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadofoth|sadofoth]] || [[word:sadofoj|sadofoj]] || [[word:sadofosh|sadofosh]] || [[word:sadofo|sadofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadofothol|sadofothol]] || [[word:sadofojol|sadofojol]] || [[word:sadofoshol|sadofoshol]] || [[word:sadofokol|sadofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadofothotho|sadofothotho]] || [[word:sadofojojo|sadofojojo]] || [[word:sadofoshosho|sadofoshosho]] || [[word:sadofoko|sadofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadofothon|sadofothon]] || [[word:sadofojon|sadofojon]] || [[word:sadofoshon|sadofoshon]] || [[word:sadofokon|sadofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadofothoro|sadofothoro]] || [[word:sadofojoro|sadofojoro]] || [[word:sadofoshoro|sadofoshoro]] || [[word:sadofokoro|sadofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
